text: The commissioner, when processing reports of accidents filed pursuant to this article, shall give priority to reports involving serious physical injury (as defined in subdivision ten of section 10.00 of the penal law) or death.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 6
#### Article 22. Accidents & Accident Reports
##### § 606 — Processing of required reports

The commissioner, when processing reports of accidents filed pursuant to this article, shall give priority to reports involving serious physical injury (as defined in subdivision ten of section 10.00 of the penal law) or death.

*Last modified: Feb. 19, 2016*
